en_title: Backrooms and Obsession Lead the Box Office as Audiences Show Up for Low-Budget Horror
cn_title: 《后室》与《痴迷》领跑票房，低成本恐怖片迎来黄金时代
subtitle: 便宜出奇迹
opus_summary: 《后室》以8145万美元北美开画强势登顶，A24创下历史最佳开画纪录。20岁YouTube导演凯恩·帕森斯的首部长片，仅用1000万美元成本即拿下冠军。26岁YouTube导演库里·巴克用75万美元拍的《痴迷》以2640万美元居亚，第三周末逆跌10%，成1982年《E.T.》以来首部连续两周末增长的影片。观众正在用票房为低成本恐怖片投票。

paragraphs.en: Backrooms and Obsession are ushering in a new appreciation for low-budget horror movies after both YouTuber-directed projects managed to lead the box office race with strong numbers this weekend.
paragraphs.cn: 《后室》与《痴迷》正引领观众重新认识低成本恐怖片的魅力——两部由YouTube博主执导的作品在本周末以强势票房领跑大盘。

paragraphs.en: A24's Backrooms secured the top spot with an estimated weekend domestic gross of $81.45 million across 3,442 locations and $118 million worldwide. It's a sign that its creepy pasta-come-to-life concept and strong reviews from critics helped lead audiences to theaters as the summer movie season kicks off.
paragraphs.cn: A24出品的《后室》以预计8145万美元北美周末票房（3442家影院）、全球1.18亿美元的佳绩荣登榜首。这部将都市怪谈搬上大银幕的影片凭借其令人毛骨悚然的概念和媒体好评，在暑期档开局阶段成功吸引观众走进影院。

paragraphs.en: Backrooms also happens to have been directed by first-time filmmaker and YouTuber Kane Parsons a.k.a. Kane Pixels. The film's opening weekend performance at the box office would be considered a success for anyone, but its position as a debut feature from a 20-year-old director with a reported $10 million budget only makes its number one spot more impressive.
paragraphs.cn: 《后室》的导演是首次拍长片的YouTube博主凯恩·帕森斯（Kane Parsons，又名Kane Pixels）。这个开画成绩对任何人来说都算成功，但考虑到导演年仅20岁、预算仅1000万美元，这次登顶更显惊人。

paragraphs.en: While A24 celebrates Backrooms taking it to its biggest opening weekend of all time, Focus Features' Obsession is running victory laps by claiming the number two spot after a third weekend in theaters following its wide May 15 release. The monkey's paw horror movie, which was directed by 26-year-old YouTuber and comedian Curry Barker on a famously low $750,000 budget, had a monumental $26.4 million domestic pull through the weekend.
paragraphs.cn: 在A24为《后室》创下公司史上最佳开画纪录而庆祝的同时，焦点影业（Focus Features）的《痴迷》也在欢庆胜利——这部电影5月15日大规模公映后，第三个周末仍稳居亚军。这部「猴爪」式恐怖片由26岁的YouTube博主兼喜剧演员库里·巴克（Curry Barker）执导，预算仅75万美元，本周末北美收2640万美元。

paragraphs.en: That's a 10% increase from last weekend alone and puts its domestic total at $104.75 million. Obsession also saw a 21% increase internationally with $40.2 million, placing its global total at $148 million. Barker's breakout hit – which attracted moviegoers with strong word-of-mouth thanks in part to a critically acclaimed performance from Inde Navarrette as Nikki – now stands as the first film to increase through its second and third weekends since Steven Spielberg's E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial in 1982.
paragraphs.cn: 相较上周上涨10%，北美累计已达1.0475亿美元；海外再涨21%收4020万美元，全球累计1.48亿美元。巴克这部突破之作——印达·纳瓦雷特（Inde Navarrette）饰演的Nikki备受好评，口碑带动观影热潮——成为自1982年史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格《E.T.外星人》之后，首部在第二和第三个周末连续实现票房增长的影片。

paragraphs.en: Audiences are making time to go to the movies, both on the weekends and even during the week, to see low-budget horror movies from relatively unknown directors. IGN felt both movies were worth checking out, too, with both Backrooms and Obsession earning 8/10 reviews from our reviewers. For the latter, we said it "should and will put Barker on the map as a horror filmmaker," while we called the former a "terrifying and thrilling big-screen debut for the liminal horror classic."
paragraphs.cn: 观众正在挤出时间（无论是周末还是工作日）去看这些由相对不知名导演拍摄的低成本恐怖片。IGN也认为这两部电影值得一看，给了《后室》和《痴迷》双双8/10的评分。评《痴迷》时我们说它「应该、也必将让巴克跻身恐怖片导演之列」，称《后室》为「阈限恐怖经典的惊险大银幕首秀」。

paragraphs.en: With Backrooms in first and Obsession in second, third place for the domestic box office's final weekend in May 2026 fell to Star Wars spin-off The Mandalorian and Grogu, while Michael and The Breadwinner rounded out the top five. For more, you can read our explanation of the Backrooms, and you can see what some of the film's cast had to say about those ghost director rumors. You can also check out our thoughts on Markiplier's recent feature film, Iron Lung.
paragraphs.cn: 在《后室》和《痴迷》占据前两名的背景下，2026年5月最后一个周末北美票房第三名是《星球大战》衍生作《曼达洛人与格罗古》，《迈克尔》和《养家之人》位列前五。更多内容可阅读我们对后室电影宇宙的解读，以及演员们如何回应「幽灵导演」传闻。你还可以看看我们对Markiplier新片《Iron Lung》的评价。

paragraphs.en: Michael Cripe is a freelance writer with IGN. He's best known for his work at sites like The Pitch, The Escapist, and OnlySP. Be sure to give him a follow on Bluesky (@mikecripe.bsky.social) and Twitter (@MikeCripe).
paragraphs.cn: Michael Cripe是IGN的自由撰稿人，曾为The Pitch、The Escapist、OnlySP等媒体供稿。欢迎在Bluesky（@mikecripe.bsky.social）和Twitter（@MikeCripe）关注他。
